name: com.sportwizzard/sportwizzard
description: Real-time sports betting data: odds, player props, edges and arbitrage from 35+ books and DFS apps.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer <api-key> — free self-serve keys at https://sportwizzard.com/account (API Keys tab), no card required

environmentVariables.name: SPORTWIZZARD_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Free self-serve API key from https://sportwizzard.com/account (API Keys tab)
